task.objective: Pull the Batched Leaf vertical slice forward from the post-bootstrap sequence: implement canopy.batched_leaf per 10_FOLIAGE_VINES_AND_DETAILS.md (deterministic placement, folded two-triangle leaf cards, one batch mesh per parent node, per-leaf named random streams), register the type, add regression tests, and dress the showcase sample documents with foliage.

outputs: samples/documents: foliage generators and leaf materials for all three showcase trees

validation.result: 100% tests passed (12 suites) on both presets, including new batched-leaf tests
CoastalOak 460 nodes / 35,567 tris (a83ffe401c2e0cca); AlpineFir 961 / 164,070 (633148cbb19718ec); WeepingWillow 134 / 29,919 (2a6806257fe1fdf2); zero warnings; hashes reproduce across repeated runs

risks: Leaf collision and shade pruning not yet implemented (10_FOLIAGE policies); dense batches can interpenetrate branches
Batched leaves use quad cards only; leaf assets/cutouts and LOD variants arrive with the material system
